description_long: This object is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly red and yellow skin, featuring a natural gradient of colors and a slightly irregular, organic shape. The surface is smooth with a subtle sheen, and the apple displays a small, darkened stem cavity at one end. One side of the apple shows a large bite taken out, exposing the pale, fibrous interior flesh. The skin has some minor surface imperfections and color variations, typical of a real apple. The overall form is round but slightly asymmetrical, with gentle bulges and indentations. The apple appears fresh, with no visible stickers or labels.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with a bite taken out and a smooth, slightly shiny surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the apple's stem cavity and red-yellow gradient skin.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the apple's rounded shape and yellow-orange hues.
description_view_2: Back view reveals a large bite exposing the pale interior flesh.
description_view_3: Opposite side shows mostly yellow skin with subtle red blending.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, minor surface marks
